# Against Method

*[Feyerabend](../philosophers/feyerabend.md) · 1975*

An 'anarchist' pamphlet against the idea of a single scientific method. Through the history of science, Feyerabend shows that the great advances, in Galileo above all, were made by breaking the rules then held to be rational. His provocative slogan, 'anything goes', is meant to defend the plurality of paths to knowledge against the monopoly of science.
